TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Afghanistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 N, 65 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 652,230 sq km (maki' tay 41ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 652,230 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,332,025. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 58.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' pzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kabul. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zywaw na kinkesan zywaw na raran ŚŹ§šĽ£ spuwah na semong sinsi 'lwa,wayan magal kawas ga maki squilq na rhyal Afuhan la.Afuhan ga maki na šł≠šļě spayat tuqiy. ggalan pila cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: a*…£ńßanis~…ētan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē pzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a kaő≤ul. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a as~…ēńßra* …£ńßani ańßma*zai, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. zjwaw na kinkes~…ēan zjwaw na raran ** s~…ēpuwańß na s~…ēemoŇč s~…ēins~…ēi Ēlwa,wajan ma…£al kawas~…ē …£a maki s~…ēquilq na rńßjal a*uńßan la.a*uńßan …£a maki na ** s~…ēpajat tuqij. …£…£alan pila ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru ¶~ ®ia ***
S.FORM: Afghanistan hya' ga cyux maki' tay 33 00 N, 65 00 E na Aziya' syuw. kwara' kinghciyan niya' 652,230 sq km (maki' tay 41ginkgan kin wahci') (kinwhci' niya' ga 652,230 sq km , kinwhci' na lawsayan wsilung hya' ga 0 sq km) Kinkhmayan kwara' squliq hya' ga 33,332,025. Pinbcyan naha' sni' naha' rhzyal hya' iy pqmahun hya' ga 58.10% , lhlahuy hya' ga 2.10%, sni' naha' sa pptzyuwaw sa bzinah hya' ga 39.80%. spzyang qalang na Kokka' pzyang naha' krahu' qalang hya' ga Kabul. snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' snyan kinramat inlungan na Kokka' hya' ga 19 na tay mspat byacing na qutux kawas. mrhuw Kokka' mrhuw Kokka' ta' misuw hya' ga Ashraf Ghani Ahmadzai, aring ryax tay 29 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. zywaw na kinkesan zywaw na raran ŚŹ§šĽ£ spuwah na semong sinsi 'lwa,wayan magal kawas ga maki squilq na rhyal Afuhan la.Afuhan ga maki na šł≠šļě spayat tuqiy. ggalan pila cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru CIA Ś§Ėšļ§ťÉ®
S.PHON: a*…£ńßanis~…ētan ńßja Ē …£a ¶~ ®jux maki Ē taj ** ** n, ** ** e na azija Ē s~…ējuw. kwara Ē kiŇčńß ¶~ ®ijan nija Ē ***,*** s~…ēq km (maki Ē taj **…£ink…£an kin wańß ¶~ ®i Ē) (kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē nija Ē …£a ***,*** s~…ēq km , kinwńß ¶~ ®i Ē na laws~…ēajan ws~…ēiluŇč ńßja Ē …£a * s~…ēq km) kinkńßmajan kwara Ē s~…ēquliq ńßja Ē …£a **,***,***. pinő≤ ¶~ ®jan nańßa Ē s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē rńßzjal ńßja Ē ij pqmańßun ńßja Ē …£a **.**% , lńßlańßuj ńßja Ē …£a *.**%, s~…ēni Ē nańßa Ē s~…ēa pptzjuwaw s~…ēa ő≤zinańß ńßja Ē …£a **.**%. s~…ēpzjaŇč qalaŇč na kokka Ē pzjaŇč nańßa Ē krańßu Ē qalaŇč ńßja Ē …£a kaő≤ul. s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē s~…ēnjan kinramat inluŇčan na kokka Ē ńßja Ē …£a ** na taj ms~…ēpat ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč na qutux kawas~…ē. mrńßuw kokka Ē mrńßuw kokka Ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a as~…ēńßra* …£ńßani ańßma*zai, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. zjwaw na kinkes~…ēan zjwaw na raran ** s~…ēpuwańß na s~…ēemoŇč s~…ēins~…ēi Ēlwa,wajan ma…£al kawas~…ē …£a maki s~…ēquilq na rńßjal a*uńßan la.a*uńßan …£a maki na ** s~…ēpajat tuqij. …£…£alan pila ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru ¶~ ®ia ***
